title: Praxis Domain Authoring Context Hints
description: Quickstart mirror of the config-starter AiDomainCatalogContextHint contract, plus optional direct-authoring extensions, so an LLM can use runtime domain knowledge without reading source code.

schemaVersion.description: Canonical config-starter schema version for domain catalog context hints.

serviceKey.description: Semantic owner service used to retrieve the domain catalog release.

contextKey.description: Optional broader context used by runtime-generated candidate hints.

resourceKey.description: Primary domain resource for the authoring task.

type.description: Canonical catalog item focus requested for retrieval.

itemTypes.description: Optional canonical catalog item filters for retrieval.

intent.description: Optional intent for the semantic retrieval.

nodeType.description: Optional semantic node type when type=node.

query.description: Business query used to retrieve relevant domain context.

limit.description: Maximum number of catalog items requested for retrieval.

enabled.description: Whether relationship hints should be considered by authoring.

federated.description: Whether relationship lookup may cross resource or service boundaries.

serviceKey.description: Optional service key for non-federated relationship lookup.

sourceNodeKey.description: Optional source node key for relationship lookup.

targetNodeKey.description: Optional target node key for relationship lookup.

edgeType.description: Optional semantic edge type for relationship lookup.

limit.description: Maximum number of relationship items requested for retrieval.

artifactKind.description: Quickstart direct-authoring extension. Required by direct authoring callers, optional in runtime-generated retrieval hints.

targetLayer.description: Quickstart direct-authoring extension. Layer where an approved draft may be materialized.

recommendedAuthoringFlow.description: Optional canonical authoring flow that the frontend/agent should prefer before materializing an approved draft.

recommendedRuleType.description: Optional canonical shared-rule type to seed domain-rules simulation when recommendedAuthoringFlow=shared_rule_authoring.

governance.description: Quickstart direct-authoring extension for governance expectations.
